description: This file provides database utility functions using SQLAlchemy, including session management, query execution, and custom error handling for a manufacturing defect management system backend.

classes.name: DbConflictError
classes.description: Custom exception raised when database integrity/constraint conflicts occur.

methods.name: None _init()
methods.description: Initializes database engine and sessionmaker singleton using loaded settings.

methods.name: Engine get_engine()
methods.description: Returns the singleton SQLAlchemy engine instance.

methods.name: Iterator[Session] get_db_session()
methods.description: FastAPI dependency that yields a database session, managing commit/rollback.

methods.name: Iterator[Session] session_scope()
methods.description: Context manager for internal database session management with commit/rollback.

methods.name: Optional[Dict[str,Any]] fetch_one(db: Session, sql: str, params: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None)
methods.description: Executes a SQL query to fetch a single record as a dictionary.

methods.name: List[Dict[str,Any]] fetch_all(db: Session, sql: str, params: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None)
methods.description: Executes a SQL query to fetch all matching records as a list of dictionaries.

methods.name: int execute(db: Session, sql: str, params: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None)
methods.description: Executes a SQL command, handling IntegrityError exceptions, returns affected row count.

ctags.name: execute
ctags.pattern: /^def execute(db: Session, sql: str, params: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None) -> int:$/
ctags.signature: (db: Session, sql: str, params: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None)

ctags.name: fetch_all
ctags.pattern: /^def fetch_all(db: Session, sql: str, params: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None) -> List[Dict[str, /
ctags.signature: (db: Session, sql: str, params: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None)

ctags.name: fetch_one
ctags.pattern: /^def fetch_one(db: Session, sql: str, params: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None) -> Optional[Dict[s/
ctags.signature: (db: Session, sql: str, params: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None)
